raw_applications.description: Raw application records ingested from upstream lending platform

customer_id.description: Unique customer identifier. One customer can have multiple applications

application_dt.description: Date the application was submitted by the customer

product_type.description: Product line of the application. Possible values: CREDIT_CARD, PERSONAL_LOAN, AUTO_LOAN. WARNING: Can be NULL when upstream feed sends incomplete payloads.

credit_score.description: FICO credit score at time of application. Range: 300-850. Note: values of 0 indicate no credit history, not an actual score.

annual_income.description: Self-reported annual income in USD at time of application

requested_amount.description: Credit limit or loan amount requested by the customer in USD

state.description: US state code of the applicant (e.g. VA, CA, NY)

channel.description: Acquisition channel. Possible values: ONLINE, BRANCH, PARTNER

raw_status.description: Raw underwriting decision. Possible values: APPROVED, DECLINED, PENDING, REFERRED

ingested_at.description: Timestamp when this record was loaded into the data warehouse

da_approval_metrics.description: Analytical table calculating approval rates by product, channel, and time. Built on raw_applications.

application_dt.description: Date of application, used as the primary time dimension for reporting

product_type.description: Product line dimension. Inherited from raw_applications.product_type

total_apps.description: Total number of applications received for this dimension combination

approved_apps.description: Number of applications that received approve_flag = 1

approve_flag.description: Binary approval indicator. Value is 1 (approved) when ALL conditions are met: credit_score > 700 AND annual_income > 50000 AND product_type IS NOT NULL AND raw_status = APPROVED. Otherwise 0.

approve_rate_pct.description: Approval rate as a percentage. Calculated as approved_apps / total_apps * 100. This is the metric shown in BA dashboards.

last_refreshed_at.description: Timestamp of the last time this table was refreshed
